title: Airpower, Advice, and D.C. Favorites with David Deptula
author: Patrick McSpadden
summary:
Lt. Gen. (ret) David Deptula sat down with Patrick McSpadden in the War on the Rocks studio for a wide-ranging conversation. Deptula highlights the Air Force’s current challenges and addresses what it will take to fix them. The duo discuss everything from previous missions to Deptula’s advice for current Airmen, even delving into his favorite D.C. gems for food and drinks. You don’t want to miss this special episode of Airman Pulse.Note: This is a free episode of the members-only Airman Pulse podcast.
